business.name: Savanna Bites Restaurant
business.location: Kijabe Street, off Koinange, Nairobi CBD

faqs.question: How do I place an order?
faqs.answer: You can order by: (1) Walking in — we have a counter and sit-down area, (2) WhatsApp at +254 722 456 789 for pickup or delivery, (3) calling us during business hours. For office catering orders above KES 10,000, please give us 24 hours notice.
faqs.answer_sw: Unaweza kuagiza kwa: (1) Kuja moja kwa moja, (2) WhatsApp +254 722 456 789 kwa kuchukua au utoaji, (3) Kupiga simu wakati wa biashara. Kwa maagizo ya ofisi zaidi ya KES 10,000, tupe masaa 24 ya awali.

faqs.question: Do you deliver and to which areas?
faqs.question_sw: Mnatuma chakula na kwa maeneo gani?
faqs.answer: Yes! We deliver within Nairobi CBD, Westlands, Upper Hill, Kilimani, Hurlingham, and South B/C. Delivery fee: FREE for orders above KES 1,500, otherwise KES 200 flat. Lunchtime delivery (11 AM – 2 PM) is prioritised for office orders. We also partner with Glovo and Uber Eats for wider coverage.
faqs.answer_sw: Ndiyo! Tunatuma ndani ya Nairobi CBD, Westlands, Upper Hill, Kilimani, Hurlingham, na South B/C. Utoaji BURE kwa maagizo zaidi ya KES 1,500, vinginevyo KES 200. Pia tupo kwenye Glovo na Uber Eats.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept: (1) M-Pesa – Paybill 522522, Account: SavannaBites, (2) Cash – at the counter or on delivery, (3) Visa/Mastercard – we have a POS terminal, (4) Bank transfer – for catering invoices above KES 20,000.
faqs.answer_sw: Tunakubali: (1) M-Pesa – Paybill 522522, Akaunti: SavannaBites, (2) Pesa taslimu, (3) Visa/Mastercard, (4) Uhamisho wa benki kwa maagizo makubwa zaidi ya KES 20,000.

faqs.question: Do you do office catering or event orders?
faqs.question_sw: Mnafanya catering ya ofisi au hafla?
faqs.answer: Yes! We cater for offices, meetings, and events. Options: (1) Daily office lunch packages from KES 350 per person (min 10 people), (2) Event platters — samosa, bhajia, and sandwich platters from KES 5,000, (3) Full event catering with service staff — contact us for a custom quote. We need at least 48 hours notice for event orders.
faqs.answer_sw: Ndiyo! Tunafanya catering kwa ofisi, mikutano, na hafla. Tunahitaji masaa 48 ya awali kwa maagizo ya hafla. Wasiliana nasi kwa bei maalum.

faqs.question: Do you have vegetarian or special diet options?
faqs.question_sw: Mna vyakula vya mboga tu au mlo maalum?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer: vegetarian options (beans stew, lentil soup, veggie chapati wrap), vegan-friendly dishes (githeri, mukimo without butter on request), and gluten-free options (rice-based meals, grilled meats). Please inform us of any allergies when ordering. We cannot guarantee a fully allergen-free kitchen.
faqs.answer_sw: Ndiyo! Tuna chaguo za mboga tu, vegan, na bila gluten. Tafadhali tuambie kuhusu mzio wowote unapoagiza.

faqs.question: Do you have a loyalty or rewards programme?
faqs.question_sw: Mna mpango wa uaminifu au tuzo?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our Bites Club card gives you a stamp for every purchase above KES 500. Collect 10 stamps and get a FREE meal worth up to KES 600. Pick up your card at the counter. For office accounts ordering 3+ times a week, we offer a 10% monthly discount.
faqs.answer_sw: Ndiyo! Kadi yetu ya Bites Club inakupa muhuri kwa kila ununuzi zaidi ya KES 500. Kusanya muhuri 10 upate mlo BURE hadi KES 600.

faqs.question: What if I am unhappy with my food?
faqs.question_sw: Nifanye nini kama sijaridhika na chakula?
faqs.answer: Your satisfaction matters to us. If something is wrong with your order, let us know immediately (in person or via WhatsApp +254 722 456 789). We will either replace the dish, offer a credit for your next visit, or issue a refund via M-Pesa. Feedback within 1 hour of delivery is appreciated so we can act fast.
faqs.answer_sw: Kuridhika kwako ni muhimu kwetu. Kama kuna tatizo na agizo lako, tuambie mara moja. Tutabadilisha sahani, kutoa mkopo, au kurejesha pesa kwa M-Pesa.

faqs.question: How can I contact Savanna Bites?
faqs.answer: Phone/WhatsApp: +254 722 456 789 | Email: hello@savannabites.co.ke | Instagram: @savannabites | Location: Kijabe Street, off Koinange, Nairobi CBD | Hours: Mon–Fri 6:30 AM–9 PM, Sat 7 AM–10 PM, Sun 8 AM–4 PM.
faqs.answer_sw: Simu/WhatsApp: +254 722 456 789 | Barua pepe: hello@savannabites.co.ke | Instagram: @savannabites | Mahali: Kijabe Street, Nairobi CBD.

faqs.question: What are your opening hours?
faqs.answer: Monday – Friday: 6:30 AM – 9:00 PM | Saturday: 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM | Sunday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM. Breakfast is served 6:30 AM – 10:30 AM, lunch 11:30 AM – 3:00 PM, snacks available all day.
faqs.answer_sw: Jumatatu–Ijumaa: 6:30 AM–9 PM | Jumamosi: 7 AM–10 PM | Jumapili: 8 AM–4 PM. Kifungua kinywa: 6:30–10:30 AM, chakula cha mchana: 11:30 AM–3 PM, vitafunio mchana kutwa.

faqs.question: Can I reserve a table?
faqs.answer: We are mostly a casual walk-in restaurant, but you can reserve for groups of 6 or more by calling or WhatsApp. For private dining (birthday, baby shower), we can set aside our back area for groups of 15–30 people — KES 5,000 reservation fee, redeemable against your food bill.
faqs.answer_sw: Tunapokea wateja bila kuhifadhi, lakini unaweza kuhifadhi kwa vikundi vya watu 6 au zaidi kwa kupiga simu au WhatsApp. Kwa hafla za kibinafsi (siku ya kuzaliwa), tunaweza kutengea eneo la nyuma kwa watu 15–30.
